'''Ussar Vlee''' was a [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[ruetsavii]] who, along with two other companions, was sent to observe [[Ooryl Qrygg]]'s life and determine whether or not he was worthy of becoming ''[[janwuine]]''. Not only did he and his companions watch Qrygg, but they also participated in several battles with Ooryl's infamous [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadron, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. Vlee proved very adept at flying and undercover work.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
